items.title: Jackie Reyes Yanes Talks Affordable Housing in Ward 1
items.summary: Jackie Reyes Yanes discussed her housing priorities and community-centered vision for Ward 1.

items.title: Ward 1 Candidate Forum Highlights Community Priorities
items.summary: The Ward 1 candidate forum focused on housing, public safety, and support for local businesses.

items.title: Jackie Meets with Residents at Senior Estates
items.summary: Residents shared concerns about affordability, mobility, and quality of life during a community meet-and-greet.
